subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Throughout every region and land, Thy loved ones are under threat from stranger and foe alike, weary unto death [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار ياران در هر گوشه و کنار در تحت تهديد بيگانه و اغيارند از جان بيزار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @power of prayer, @prayer for protection
